title: Sitnasuak Successfully Advanced to #25 in the Top 49ers Ranked by Alaska Business Monthly
summary: Nome, Alaska | October 6, 2020 SNC CEO Charles Fagerstrom shared, “We are honored and proud to be recognized by Alaska Business in the Top 49ers and advancing to the top 25 companies in Alaska. title: U.S. Corn and Soybean Production Down from September
summary: Corn and soybean production is down from September 2020, according to the Crop Production report issued today by USDA’s National Agricultural Statistics Service (NASS). Corn production is up 8% from last year, forecast at 14.7 billion bushels; soybean growers are expected to increase their productio...
